issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering into multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the redundant tasks to avoid double-follow-up.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for those deal stages. A tweak was made to the workflow filters to suppress tasks for these statuses.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or delete any outstanding check-in tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails to the agent continued to display the old LO's information instead of the newly assigned LO. The issue was reported on a specific deal where Paul was replaced by Julie Yocum. The fix was confirmed by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO changed during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for these deals. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be resolved after a support ticket was filed. MRC deals typically have no LO assigned, which was initially suspected but ruled out as the direct cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.
